Frequently Asked Questions
1. UP SCVTUP ITI Admissions Online Form 2026 Start Date?
The online application process started on 11 July 2026.
2. What is the admission process for UP SCVTUP ITI?
Admissions are conducted on a merit-based basis.
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the UP SCVTUP ITI Admissions?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the UP SCVTUP ITI Admissions are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. UP SCVTUP ITI 2026 Admissions Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. UP SCVTUP ITI Admissions 2026 Last Date?
The last date to apply online is As per Schedule .
6. What is the last date to Pay application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to As per Schedule .
7. How can I apply for UP SCVTUP ITI Admissions?
UP SCVTUP ITI Admissions Online Form 2026.
tables: UP State Council for Vocational Training SCVTUP 2026 Admissions Apply Online for All Courses

State Council for Vocational Training, UP has released the SCVTUP ITI Admissions 2026 online application for admission 2026 will start from 11 July 2026 and the last date to apply will be As per Schedule. candidates should read the SCVTUP ITI Admissions 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, placement, fees, college information and other types of information and then apply.

State Council for Vocational Training, UP Government and Private College ITI Admission Online Form 2026 SCVTUP Admissions 2026 :  Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM Since 2012

Important Dates Application Begin : 11/07/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : As per Schedule Last Date Pay Exam Fee : As per Schedule Merit List Issued : As per Schedule Counseling Begin : As per Schedule
Application Fees General / OBC : 250 /- SC / ST : 150 /- Pay the Examination Fee Through ITI College Prepaid Coupon Mode or Through Debit Card, Credit Card or Net Banking
UP ITI Eligibility 2026 Class 8 OR Class 10 (High School) from Any Recognized Board in India. for Course Wise Eligibility Read Notification.
UP ITI Age Limit as on 01/08/2026 Minimum Age : 14 Years Candidate Born After : 31/07/2011

How to Fill Uttar Pradesh UP ITI Online Form 2026 State Council of Vocation Training SCVT ITI Admission 2026. Candidate Can Apply Online Between 11/07/2026 to As per Schedule Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the ITI Admission Application Form in UP ITI Various Govt. and Private ITI Institute in Uttar Pradesh Session 2026. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Admission Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Are Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Pay and Complete Your Form Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
